final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide visual for the Changan Origin Q06 September launch announcement, intended as a presentation title slide with brand-aligned headline and subheadline.

Style/medium: automotive brand PPT cover, photorealistic CGI render with dramatic depth
Composition: wide cinematic layout, vehicle or brand emblem as hero element centered or lower-third, headline and subheadline text overlaid in upper or center zone
Subject: Changan Origin Q06 vehicle launch — headline and subheadline prominently displayed
Scene/backdrop: translucent, luminous deep-space or atmospheric backdrop — layered light rays, volumetric glow, sense of depth and grandeur; dark base with brilliant highlights to convey premium impact
Lighting/mood: dramatic, high-contrast volumetric lighting; awe-inspiring and forward-looking; conveys technological sophistication and brand confidence
Color palette: deep midnight blue and black base with electric blue and silver accent light streaks; subtle warm gold highlight to signal premium positioning
Materials/textures: smooth metallic surfaces, glass-like translucent light layers, fine particle atmosphere
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06" as main headline; "将于9月上市" as subheadline
Constraints: text must be legible against the backdrop; layout must work as a 16:9 slide cover; brand-premium aesthetic throughout
Avoid: generic stock-photo backgrounds, cluttered composition, low-contrast text, cartoon or flat illustration style
